items.title: Payment in Advance
content: Payment must be made in advance.
Payment can be made via bank transfer or cash.
If payment is not made on time, the lesson may be cancelled.

items.title: Cancellation and Rescheduling
content: Cancellation is free up to 24 hours before the start of the lesson.
For cancellations within 24 hours before the start, 50% will be charged.
In case of no-show, the full amount will be charged.
Rescheduling a lesson is possible in consultation.
In case of illness, a new appointment will be made in consultation.
